name: John Doe
history: Past experiences of pressure related to performance and social interactions. Reports presenting a confident front and hiding vulnerability. A recent business failure led to financial hardship.
intermediate_belief: If I show vulnerability, I will be judged and rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I must handle my problems alone to avoid burdening others.
coping_strategies: Presents a confident front and avoids discussing financial difficulties.
situation: Took out a loan instead of asking family or friends for help. In social situations, acts to distract attention from financial difficulties.
auto_thought: I can't let others see I'm struggling.
behavior: Avoids discussing personal issues and financial struggles with others.
